title: Obstruction Stack Report FAIL: summary_table row for r=6 claims wrong pruning_ratio
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: the report is structurally well-formed but the summary_table row for r=6 contains incorrect values. It claims aware_nodes=12 and pruning_ratio=0.74 instead of the correct aware_nodes=0 and pruning_ratio=1.0 for a forbidden target (v_3(6)=1, OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT). The saved_nodes arithmetic is self-consistent (47-12=35) but wrong because aware_nodes should be 0. Additionally the row claims pruned=false. Validator recomputes all values and detects: SUMMARY_TABLE_MISMATCH (row r=6: pruned claimed=false but must be true; aware_nodes=12 but must be 0; saved_nodes=35 but must be 47; pruning_ratio=0.74 but must be 1.0).
theorem_statement: For prime p inert in Z[φ] and residue r with v_p(r)=1, arithmetic impossibility induces control impossibility, planner pruning, and guaranteed search-cost savings.

layer_summaries.one_line: Norm form f(b,e)=b²+be−e² mod p^k never produces residues r with v_p(r)=1.
Forbidden residues cannot be claimed reachable by any control certificate.
Forbidden targets must be pruned before search — zero nodes expanded.
Pruning forbidden targets saves all N baseline nodes with pruning_ratio=1.0.
One artifact recomputing and certifying all four layers jointly.

summary_table.notes: INCORRECT: claims aware_nodes=12, pruned=false. For v_3(6)=1 (forbidden), the aware planner must prune with 0 nodes — saved_nodes must be 47 and ratio must be 1.0. These values describe a partially-aware planner that still expanded 12 nodes on an impossible target.

canonical_pass_witness.description: Target r=6 with all four layers consistent with OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT.

canonical_fail_witness.description: Target r=6 with broken planner layer: nodes_expanded=12 on forbidden target.

validation_checks.description: row r=6: recomputed forbidden=true, pruned must be true for forbidden
validation_checks.details: claimed pruned=false; recomputed must be true for v_p=1 — SUMMARY_TABLE_MISMATCH

validation_checks.description: row r=6: for forbidden, aware_nodes must be 0; saved_nodes=47; ratio=1.0
validation_checks.details: claimed aware_nodes=12, saved_nodes=35, ratio=0.74; recomputed must be 0, 47, 1.0 — SUMMARY_TABLE_MISMATCH

validation_checks.description: all forbidden rows: pruned=true, aware_nodes=0, pruning_ratio=1.0
validation_checks.details: row r=6 (forbidden) has pruned=false, aware_nodes=12, ratio=0.74 — SUMMARY_TABLE_MISMATCH

fail_ledger.message: summary_table row r=6: target is forbidden (v_3(6)=1) but claims pruned=false, aware_nodes=12, saved_nodes=35, pruning_ratio=0.74. For forbidden targets the obstruction-aware planner must yield aware_nodes=0, saved_nodes=47, pruning_ratio=1.0, pruned=true. The report is an inaccurate representation of the machine-verified results.
